Key Takeaways:
• This Module is all about the Internal Launch and we are going to be doing the
Internal Launch through Module 4 and Module 5.
• The Internal Launch is a launch that you just do to your list.
• With the Internal Launch, you are not using any partners but it's advanced beyond
the Seed Launch where you are just starting out and you're getting a sense to create
your product and figure out what to offer.
• The Internal Launch is the heart and soul of Product Launch Formula. It's the
bread and butter and it will become the bread and butter for you going forward
within your launch.
• For the Internal Launch you need a list and you need a product.
• It's best if you have that product that’s been tested, if the offer has been tested but
you don't have to have a huge list. You can do it with this with a small list first.
• The big picture on this is you can get a lot of money from an Internal Launch and
it's relatively easy and it sets up your JV Launch.
• At the end of the day, it's about creating some Prelaunch Content, sending a bunch
of emails, send your list their Prelaunch Content and then have that lead into a
sales video or sales page.
• Don't get intimated. Just remember it's about baby steps. Just taking one step at a
time and moving forward.
• As always, go through all the videos, watch them, take notes, circle back, watch
them again.
• Take part in the community, the community needs you, we need you in the
community leaving comments.
• The Internal Launch is the core skill that is going to change everything for your
business going forward.

The Internal Launch, it's sort of this magic spot in between the Seed Launch and

Internal Launches, they are my favorite kind of launches because they are

Seed Launches are great because you are just starting out, you get paid up front
